news.title: Is It Time To Reassess Tryg (CPSE:TRYG) After Recent Share Price Swings?
news.summary: If you are wondering whether Tryg at DKK157.2 per share still offers fair value or is starting to look stretched, it helps to line up its recent share performance with what the fundamentals suggest. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 1.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 3.7% gain over 30 days, and longer term returns of 7.5% over 1 year, 15.6% over 3 years and 37.3% over 5 years, which may s

news.title: Tryg AS (TGVSF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Premium Growth and Robust Solvency ...
news.summary: Tryg AS (TGVSF) reports a solid quarter with 3.5% premium growth, a strong insurance service result, and a stable solvency ratio, despite geopolitical and inflationary challenges.
